retry_reason: As a put wrapper, retrying would lead to a double-put and potential use-after-free; failure (NULL pointer) is not an error that can be retried.
contract_summary: This is a release (put) wrapper for afs_vlserver objects. It decrements the reference count and, if it becomes zero, schedules an RCU callback to free the object. The caller must not use the vlserver pointer after calling this function. This function safely handles NULL input.

judge.reason: The function's sole purpose is to decrement the refcount of a vlserver object via refcount_dec_and_test and schedule RCU cleanup if the refcount reaches zero. There is no other business logic.
